response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates an exceptional technical background with leadership experience at major tech companies (Google, Meta) and a history of founding successful open-source projects. His expertise in architecture, full-stack development, and team mentorship aligns well with the Head of Development role. While his German proficiency is only basic, his strong communication skills and multicultural experience mitigate this concern. His open-source contributions and strategic thinking make him a compelling candidate for interview.
strengths: Extensive senior leadership experience in top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta) with full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure expertise
Strong open-source advocacy with multiple successful projects (Geo-Data platform, Fluent-Asserts) and technical contributions
Proven architecture and system design skills with experience in low-latency systems, micro-services, and Kubernetes deployments
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (minimum requirement is C1)
Limited direct experience with UML modeling despite strong architecture background
Most recent experience is in large corporations (Google/Meta) rather than consulting/IT services firms
